content.en:
Skewb Solves

The solves of a round are done in a continuous way. The set of scrambles changes every X minutes as opposed to after every group.

因为中国比赛中, 选手是固定座位的 (fixed seated)，每隔一段时间更新打乱. 所以若选手刚好在打乱交替的时候比，他的还原将使用跨组打乱.

#1 (Move, TPS)

#2 (Move, TPS)

#3 (Move, TPS)

#4 (Move, TPS)

#5 (Move, TPS)

魔方: Pro Shop Gan Skewb M Enhanced

方法：L2L法

#1 2.04 (11Move, 5.39TPS)

U B L' B U L' U B' L' B' L'

z' y' // inspection

u R' F // orange layer

z' F R' F R z2 H B // L2L-PX (6a)

#2 (4.47) (23Move, 5.15TPS)

B L B R' L B' L' U B' U' L

x y // inspection

U z R U' F R z U' R' F R F' R U' // green layer / 1-look fail

z R' F' R U R' H U R' F // L2L-L5C (36a)

Better solution:

x y // inspection

U z R U' R // green layer

x' F R' L R L' u' F' R // L2L-LU (21a)

#3 1.41 (10Move, 7.09TPS)

R B R U L' B L R' U R U

R' F' R F' R F' z' R' F' R F' // red layer cancel into L2L-LS (18h)

without cancellation:

R' F' R F R' // red layer

R F R F' z' R' F' R F' // L2L-LS (18h)

L R L U B' L' R B' L' R L'

without cancellation:

y x // inspection

u R' F' R' F // orange layer

z S // L2L-Ph1

U' S z2' R' F R' F' // L2L-PX (6c)
